text: Airbnb reported Q2 2025 earnings on August 7-8, 2025, beating EPS estimates by 9.5% with revenue of $3.096B representing 36.27% YoY growth C003 C012 K001. Net income reached $642M, up 316.88% YoY, with operating and net margins of 19.77% and 20.74% respectively K002 K003 K004. Despite the earnings beat, shares fell approximately 7% following management's margin warning for Q3 and Q4 2025 C020. The stock continued underperforming the market into August 11, 2025 C001. Analyst commentary suggests the elevated valuation leaves little margin for error amid economic risks C015.
